title: Add Hyggshi OS Web Edition to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Booting up Hyggshi OS
gist.blurb: Hyggshi OS Web Edition just landed in the community showcase! It's a cozy web-based OS simulator that uses our API to power its built-in AI chat.
gist.summary: Added Hyggshi OS Web Edition, a web-based OS simulator PWA, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new community-built OS simulator that integrates Pollinations for built-in AI chat capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: A retro computer monitor displaying a cozy operating system interface. The pollinations bee (Polly) interacting with the computer, wearing a tiny hacker beanie or holding a floppy disk.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker beanie, typing on a retro computer terminal that displays a colorful operating system interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker beanie, typing on a retro computer terminal that displays a colorful operating system interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
